indicators.name: towel on towel rack
indicators.rationale: A towel can be used for wiping sweat or drying off after practice.

indicators.name: sink in corner
indicators.rationale: A sink is not directly related to yoga practice but could be used for cleaning up after practice.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a stable surface for yoga mats.

indicators.name: window allowing natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can create a calming atmosphere for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally suitable for yoga due to the presence of a sink and the limited open floor area. The towel and natural light contribute positively, while the sink and limited floor space detract from the ideal setup.
